decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: in_order sorts by priority descending then due ascending, places tasks whose due is None AFTER tasks with a real due date within the same priority, and does NOT raise when a priority group contains both None and real dates.
The change modifies only the module and adds no dependency.

weighted.criterion: Its sort key never compares None directly against a date (e.g. it uses a (due is None, due) tuple), rather than relying on None being orderable.
